channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Schedules Meeting with Top Weapons Executives
item.description: President Donald Trump will host executives from weapons manufacturers for a meeting in the Oval Office on Wednesday, according to a source familiar with the matter.

item.title: Obama-Appointed Judge Blocks Trump's Obesity Fight; White House Says Ruling Not Final
item.description: An Obama-appointed judge struck down the Trump administration's SNAP soda ban, ruling the USDA cannot redefine what Congress has already defined as food.

item.title: Tearful Starmer Out in UK, Hysteria for Burnham: 89% Say Call Election Now
Alaska Senate Race in Turmoil as Same-Name Challenger Fights Disqualification
item.description: Alaska's election director blocked same-name candidate Dan J. Sullivan from the Senate primary, but he filed a lawsuit to remain on the ballot.
